Smart skip
Translate selection

Skip form fields
Alt On-demand translate

Legend

Sentence mode. Supported: EN, DE, ES, FR, JA.
Colors words by grammatical role.

Engines
Engine

Auto tries Chrome AI first, then MyMemory, Lingva, and configured fallbacks.

LibreTranslate URL
DeepL Free key
Shortcuts

Pin / unpin key
Dismiss key

Click a button, then press the key.
On-demand key must be a modifier.
